description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Train service enhancement during Christmas  New Year
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 聖誕新年期間加強服務

2024-12-18T19:15:00.CONTENT_EN:
MTR have added extra train trips and adjusted servicehours during Christmas and New Year as follows:

Christmas Eve (24 December)
· Alllocal lines and 7 Light Rail routes will operate overnight (except for Airport Express, Disneyland Resort Line and journeys to or from Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau stations on the East Rail Line)
· Servicehours will be extended on 3 bus routes (506, K51 and K54)


New Year's Eve (31 December)​
· Alllocal lines and 7 Light Rail routes will operate overnight (except for Airport Express, Disneyland Resort Line and journeys to or from Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau stations on the East Rail Line)
· DisneylandResort Line service hours will be extended
· Servicehours will be extended on 3 bus routes (506, K51 and K54)

There will be a total of 2,200 extra train trips between 20 December and 1 January. The Island Line and South Island Line will operate at an increased frequency of approximately 3-4 minutes most of the time during the weekends and holidays. The Airport Express will provide addition early and late train trips as follows:
· 25 December and 1 January: the first train will depart from Hong Kong Station at 5:30am
· 29 December and 1 January: the last train will depart from AsiaWorld-Expo Station at 1:00am the next day
